L3/02-test-mobile-adaptation.md.title: Test mobile adaptation on multiple devices
L3/02-test-mobile-adaptation.md.completed_output: Comprehensive testing completed. All critical and major tests passed: BottomNavigation visible on mobile, hidden on desktop; MoreMenu opens/closes correctly; TaskItem shows 3 buttons on mobile, all on desktop; ProjectCard shows 2 buttons on mobile, all on desktop; TaskForm stacks on mobile; Modal fits viewport; Dashboard responsive; Layout correct at all breakpoints; Navigation works; Touch targets meet 44px minimum. Build and typecheck successful.
